ContentDesc_Das Klyteum: The Clyteum was once the imperial army's largest manufactory, supplying munitions and war machines to sustain Garlemald's relentless territorial expansion. Where its cavernous halls once rang with the clamor of industrial production, they now resound with the shrieks of countless voidsent who emerge from fissures without cease. Jullus and the Garlean community hasten to contain the threat, but will need all the help they can get to secure victory...
